topStrengths: Layered L1-L6 architecture with MCP integration
Self-improvement loop with lessons.md + benchmark + self-eval metrics
Confidence scoring discipline + calibration with band-shift recommendations
Canonical .claude/agents/ subagent layout (auto-discovery via Task tool)
Structured JSONL event observability (events.jsonl + eval-metrics.jsonl + exec-metrics.jsonl)
Smart-router emits official hookSpecificOutput JSON; routes v4 capabilities
MCP servers configured: filesystem, memory, sequential-thinking, fetch
5-role agent pipeline: planner → researcher → implementer → reviewer → tester

evolutionHistory.summary: Frontier-research-driven rebuild. CLAUDE.md compressed from 268 → ~120 lines. Added 5 dev skills (debug-detective, architect, code-review, tdd, refactor). Added 4 dev subagents (architect, debugger, optimizer, security-auditor). Added 6 hooks (smart-router, context-guardian, git-guardian, error-recovery, session-state, test-mythos). Added 3 commands (/bootstrap, /ship, /research). Hardened settings.json: scoped Bash allowlist, hard deny on force-push to main, secret-file read deny. Wired UserPromptSubmit + PreToolUse guardrails.

Native-format subagent migration + observability + lifecycle expansion. Migrated 7 subagents to canonical .claude/agents/<name>.md so they auto-discover via the Task tool. Added 4 hooks (observability, precompact-snapshot, subagent-tracker, notification-handler) and wired 3 new lifecycle events (PreCompact, SubagentStop, Notification). Added 3 commands (/diagnose, /learn, /calibrate). Smart-router now emits official hookSpecificOutput JSON contract and injects the most recent lesson into every prompt. Added missing YAML frontmatter to 3 trading subagents. CLAUDE.md updated to v3.2 (still under 200-line budget).

MCP + multi-agent teams + auto-evaluation loop. Added mcpServers (filesystem, memory, sequential-thinking, fetch) configured in settings.json. Added 5 specialized v4 agents (planner, researcher, implementer, reviewer, tester) for the parallel-execution pipeline. Added 3 v4 skills (mcp-orchestrator, parallel-execution, self-improve). Added 2 hooks (self-eval scoring metrics on SessionEnd, execution-monitor tracking command duration). Added 2 commands (/team for orchestrated multi-agent work, /benchmark for verifiable evaluation). Upgraded /calibrate to recommend band shifts. Smart-router now routes team/parallel/benchmark/mcp/research keywords. test-mythos.sh: 159/159 checks (added 52 v4 tests). CLAUDE.md grew to 177 lines with new L5 (MCP) section, still under 200 budget. MYTHOS_VERSION=4.0.

calibration.note: Filled in by /calibrate after comparing predicted vs actual outcomes. v4: history array tracks per-session deltas; lastAdjustment records tighten/loosen/hold.
